Module com.example.battleship
Package com.example.battleship.view.ships

Class Frigate3D

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.Group
com.example.battleship.view.ships.Ship3D
com.example.battleship.view.ships.Frigate3D
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class Frigate3D extends Ship3D
Frigate: the smallest ship in the fleet, occupies 1 single cell.

Built the same way a Minecraft ship would be built out of blocks and slabs: several stacked boxes form the hull, narrow at the keel and flaring outward toward the deck (not tapering to a point). On top of that base hull it carries the small details that make a warship read as a warship: a bow deck gun, a bridge set back toward the stern, a funnel, a mast with a radar panel, a row of portholes along each side, and a stern flagstaff.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    buildBowGun(javafx.scene.Group group)
    Small deck gun right at the bow, with a thin barrel pointing forward.
    private void
    buildBowPlank(javafx.scene.Group group)
    Thin overhang jutting out past the hull's front edge, just above the waterline.
    private double
    buildBridge(javafx.scene.Group group)
    Bridge with a single window band.
    private void
    buildFlagstaff(javafx.scene.Group group)
    Thin flagstaff at the stern, with a small flag.
    private void
    buildFunnel(javafx.scene.Group group, double bridgeZ)
    Funnel (smokestack) just aft of the bridge, with a darker rim on top.
    protected javafx.scene.Group
    buildHull()
    Builds the ship's entire hull as one continuous group of Shape3D nodes (Box, Cylinder, Sphere), spanning its full length.
    private void
    buildHullLayers(javafx.scene.Group group)
    Hull: 3 stacked layers, each WIDER than the one below -- narrow keel flaring outward toward the deck (a parabola that opens upward, not a pyramid).
    private void
    buildMast(javafx.scene.Group group, double bridgeZ)
    Mast with a yard (the cross shape) and a small radar panel, rising from the bridge.
    private void
    buildPortholes(javafx.scene.Group group)
    A row of small dark portholes along each side of the lower hull.

  • Constructor Details

    • Frigate3D

      public Frigate3D(int row, int column, Orientation orientation)
      Bow faces -Z; the whole hull is centered on X = 0.

  • Method Details

    • buildHull

      protected javafx.scene.Group buildHull()
      Builds the ship's entire hull as one continuous group of Shape3D nodes (Box, Cylinder, Sphere), spanning its full length. Use Ship3D.cellCenterX(int) to place distinctive features (a bridge, a periscope, an island...) at a specific cell, and Ship3D.shipCenterX() to center pieces that span the whole ship.
      Specified by:
      buildHull in class Ship3D
      Returns:
      group representing the complete hull

    • buildHullLayers

      private void buildHullLayers(javafx.scene.Group group)
      Hull: 3 stacked layers, each WIDER than the one below -- narrow keel flaring outward toward the deck (a parabola that opens upward, not a pyramid).

    • buildBowGun

      private void buildBowGun(javafx.scene.Group group)
      Small deck gun right at the bow, with a thin barrel pointing forward.

    • buildBridge

      private double buildBridge(javafx.scene.Group group)
      Bridge with a single window band. Set back toward the stern half of the deck.

    • buildMast

      private void buildMast(javafx.scene.Group group, double bridgeZ)
      Mast with a yard (the cross shape) and a small radar panel, rising from the bridge.

    • buildFunnel

      private void buildFunnel(javafx.scene.Group group, double bridgeZ)
      Funnel (smokestack) just aft of the bridge, with a darker rim on top.

    • buildPortholes

      private void buildPortholes(javafx.scene.Group group)
      A row of small dark portholes along each side of the lower hull.

    • buildFlagstaff

      private void buildFlagstaff(javafx.scene.Group group)
      Thin flagstaff at the stern, with a small flag.

    • buildBowPlank

      private void buildBowPlank(javafx.scene.Group group)
      Thin overhang jutting out past the hull's front edge, just above the waterline.
